scripts.zip: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/function.zip index.mjs package.json node_modules
scripts.bundle: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bunx esbuild index.mjs --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs
scripts.zip:bundle: bun run bundle && (cd dist && zip -r function-bundled.zip index.mjs)
